mapper.select: SELECT id, dispatch_id, event_id, diagnosis_id, service_name, dedup_key, dispatch_status, skip_reason, create_time, start_time, end_time, update_time FROM ops_diagnosis_dispatch WHERE dedup_key = #{dedupKey} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, dispatch_id, event_id, diagnosis_id, service_name, dedup_key, dispatch_status, skip_reason, create_time, start_time, end_time, update_time FROM ops_diagnosis_dispatch WHERE service_name = #{serviceName} AND dispatch_status = 'RUNNING' ORDER BY start_time DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
